textByHashes.937c3bd95844823572c0f6d2614d17ae7e7a8b1c: And to you. Can I help you?
textByHashes.1bf0c27aede750bb1fa3993f8fbdbb74da00b97f: I am a supplier of leather armours and accessories. Ask and I will tell you what I know.
textByHashes.87c5477481d60875dd37aad632e2f8bcf02495d5: I have normal, studded and hard types.
textByHashes.1b961dc42e1c2538a3aea4d66887c086d07aac9e: Indeed, leather armour is excellent for archers. It's supple and not very heavy.
textByHashes.ace004049a90886241fb9c6d92ca946f59ba9d2f: Ah, now that's leather covered with studs. It's more protective than ordinary leather.
textByHashes.22a423c8de7d7b05c5fca2eb0871ce29eb594dc4: Hard leather is specially treated using oils and drying methods to create a hard-wearing armour.
textByHashes.c6d1cd60bf3326a4f2a8de9981ffba243356cae1: Ah yes we have a new range of accessories in stock. Essential items for an archer like you.
textByHashes.dd376df5e76c74cd5a752cbd336d902a71c8d8f3: We have vambraces, chaps, cowls and coifs.
textByHashes.0dda2b494a90887b7156ba8b64069e881b140e8a: Ah yes, vambraces. These useful items are for your arms.
textByHashes.48f6e262563072786799b0902d094ae3cda13169: A protective sheath that favours the bow and arrow. An essential purchase.
textByHashes.507f2c1c3cbc04ae8b193153b058224fc117a0ab: Chaps have two functions: firstly to protect your legs, and secondly for ease of reloading arrows.
textByHashes.84a997fe2277686428a08f1484ddb2e1b2c39607: I can highly recommend these to you for quick archery.
textByHashes.69f2a8d14b7359d567eb8893f1f636be85d5751b: The cowl is a soft leather hat, ideal for protection with maneuverability.
textByHashes.5d7ce67ade62b8489514231be3e7e8d9c02adf5e: These are highly favoured with our guards.
textByHashes.cc4b63b42d879d1320826fd57762231a0b5797fd: The coif is a specialized cowl, that has extra chain protection to keep your neck and shoulders safe.
textByHashes.fe0fdee5c7d4b652167f1b52d72fe1d0a7c59d69: An excellent addition to our range, traveller.
textByHashes.21fc902834022f7d941adf826de40bb8be4a8ce3: Indeed, cast your eyes on my wares, adventurer.
textByHashes.80ecc62501b60139fa765bafb86e8aa1ca0533a7: Certainly! Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.
textByHashes.30db9d08157a2ba0415d91fb36ab3b47c679f593: The Cape of Ranging has been modified by Ava to function as one of her accumulator devices. Is there anything else I can help you with?
